label: 最大矩形查找
description: 在网格的非零区域中查找最大的轴对齐矩形，输出矩形掩码网格及尺寸信息
description-en: Find the largest axis-aligned rectangle within non-zero cells of a grid. Outputs a mask grid and rectangle dimensions.
icon: 一个网格中用高亮色框出最大矩形区域，矩形内填充亮色，网格底色为深灰，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 二维数字网格，非零值视为可用区域，零值视为障碍
inputs.description-en: 2D number grid. Non-zero cells are treated as usable area, zero cells as obstacles.

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 矩形掩码
outputs.description: 与输入同尺寸的网格，最大矩形区域标记为 1，其余为 0
outputs.description-en: Grid of same size as input. Largest rectangle region marked as 1, rest as 0.

outputs.name: width
outputs.label: 矩形宽度
outputs.description-en: Width (number of columns) of the largest rectangle.

outputs.name: height
outputs.label: 矩形高度
outputs.description-en: Height (number of rows) of the largest rectangle.

outputs.name: area
outputs.label: 矩形面积
outputs.description: 最大矩形的面积（宽度 × 高度）
outputs.description-en: Area of the largest rectangle (width × height).

alg_tag: 在网格的非零区域中寻找最大矩形
